recommendations.title: Babylon A.D.
recommendations.overview: A veteran-turned-mercenary is hired to take a young woman with a secret from post-apocalyptic Eastern Europe to New York City.

recommendations.title: The Crimson Rivers

recommendations.title: Utøya: July 22
recommendations.overview: A teenage girl fights for survival and to locate her young sister during the 2011 terrorist attack at a political summer camp on the Norwegian island of Utøya.

recommendations.title: Gothika

recommendations.title: Swing Vote
recommendations.overview: In a remarkable turn of events, the result of the presidential election comes down to one man's vote.
